name: gau
purpose: Historical URL fetcher — aggregates URLs from Wayback Machine, Common Crawl, AlienVault OTX, and URLScan.io
author: Corben Leo (lc)
why_notable: Corben Leo identified the gap in tomnomnom's waybackurls: the Wayback Machine has broad crawl coverage but misses URLs that only appear in threat intelligence feeds or security scanner logs. gau (GetAllURLs) queries four sources in parallel — Wayback Machine CDX API, Common Crawl, AlienVault OTX (URLs from malware/phishing samples), and URLScan.io (security-researcher-submitted pages) — then deduplicates. AlienVault OTX's inclusion is uniquely valuable: it captures attack-targeted pages that normal crawlers never visit. Historical URLs surface old admin panels, backup files, old API versions, and parameter names that reveal injection candidates — all without sending a single packet to the target.
